name: Okendo
highlight_text: Best suited for: eCommerce Brands, Online Retailers
description:
What Okendo Does

Okendo is primarily a customer experience platform for online retailers and eCommerce businesses. As part of its suite, it provides tools for collecting, displaying, and leveraging customer ratings and reviews.

For eCommerce brands, Okendo positions reviews as a high-impact marketing channel for customer insights and a high-volume source of user-generated content.

The emphasis is on going beyond simple star ratings to gather more nuanced voice-of-customer data that can shape products, support, and the overall customer experience. Automated tools aim to streamline processes around review publishing, analysis and responses.

‍

Source: okendo.com

Key Features

  • Ability to define structured "attribute ratings" for granular product/service insights
  • Collect customer feedback beyond just star ratings
  • Public reply functionality to respond to reviews
  • Private messaging to resolve customer issues
  • Help desk integrations to sync review data and streamline support workflows
  • Automated publishing rules and sentiment analysis
  • Tagging, filtering, and compliance controls over published reviews.
  • Customizable and interactive formats for showcasing reviews
  • Optimized for increasing conversion rates and shopper engagement

Pricing

Offers custom prices for all services

Pros

✅The tool is very easy to set up and upgrade as business needs grow

✅The team is innovative and continuously working on product developments

✅Very receptive of feedback from customers

Cons

❌Doesn’t offer review monitoring on many key platforms for brand-level reviews

❌May not be the best choice non-eComm or non-DTC brands because of the niche ecosystem
what_people_say:
‍

What customers say

“Firstly, the platform itself is seamless, easy to set up, use, and upgrade as you grow. When comparing review platforms, Okendo came out on top in pricing, offerings and support. Okendo continually proves to me how innovative they are with their developments, and whenever I've reached out, their responses are consistently swift and helpful; no task is too big or small. ”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com

‍

“Some functions and UI within the platform from an admin perspective could be improved upon, and would love a bit deeper dive on analytics (which is already underway!)”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com
